name: scl_cell_preassigned_placement
description: Code should include standard cell library cells with pre-assigned placement locations (pPlace != -1) that trigger assertion failures in ABC's hash-based cell registration.

name: multi_cell_lib_with_sequential_skip
description: Code should include standard cell libraries containing both combinational and sequential cells where sequential cells are skipped during processing but still trigger hash table assertion conflicts.

name: abc_hashcells_assertion_on_placement
description: Code should include constructs that cause ABC's Abc_SclHashCells to fail an assertion checking that pPlace equals -1, indicating cells were already placed before hash registration.
snippet:
// Trigger: library cell processed by ABC with non-default placement
assert(*pPlace == -1); // fails when cell has existing placement
